summary: Completed testing for iteration 71 - UI/UX improvements for NASSAQ school management system. All features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Login redirect for school_principal to /principal is correctly implemented in LoginPage.jsx (line 97-98)
Schedule page has AI generation modal with proper steps display
View Full Timetable button (data-testid='view-full-timetable-btn') shows timetable in same page using showFullTimetable state
Back button (data-testid='back-from-timetable-btn') returns to main schedule view
School Settings Overview tab shows redesigned working days card with visual stats (5 working days, 2 weekend days)
Time dialog has auto-calculate button (data-testid='auto-calculate-btn') that calculates time slots
Subjects tab has full CRUD with 'إضافة مادة' button
Constraints tab shows 7 constraints with toggle buttons (مفعّل/معطّل)
Structure tab shows 3 stages with toggle buttons (data-testid='toggle-stage-{id}')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX improvements tested and working. Login redirect, schedule page features, and school settings tabs all functional.

Schedule page - AI generation modal.details: Modal opens with steps: تحليل إسنادات المعلمين والفصول, مراعاة القيود الإدارية المفعّلة, توزيع الحصص بشكل متوازن, الهدف: نسبة نجاح 100%

Schedule page - View Full Timetable.details: Button appears in generation result modal, shows timetable in same page (not navigation)

Schedule page - Back button.details: data-testid='back-from-timetable-btn' returns to main schedule view

School Settings - Overview tab.details: Shows redesigned working days card with visual stats (5 working days green, 2 weekend days red)

School Settings - Subjects CRUD.details: 12 subjects displayed with 'إضافة مادة' button for adding new subjects

School Settings - Constraints CRUD.details: 7 constraints displayed with toggle buttons for activation/deactivation

School Settings - Structure tab stage to.details: 3 stages (Elementary, Middle, High) with toggle buttons (data-testid='toggle-stage-{id}')
